text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 237 

RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_LTST 

LABEL: Scope of Medicaid or CHIP Benefits — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag that indicates the scope of Medicaid or Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP) benefits to 
which a beneficiary is entitled; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_LTST 

LONG NAME: RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_LTST 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1
